headline: Bathroom Remodeling Preparation Checklist — Altadena
articleBody:
Bathroom Remodeling Preparation Checklist for Altadena Clients

Before your Bathroom Remodeling appointment with Opus Builders, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Measurements
2. Budget
3. Design preferences
4. Permits needed
5. Material selections

Contact Opus Builders at (818) 939-8855 to get started.
